channel.title: Ci on Mike Ball
channel.description: Recent content in Ci on Mike Ball

item.title: Multi-stage Docker Builds
item.description: An introduction to leveraging multi-stage container image builds.

item.title: Transforming Terraform Output Values to Markdown with Terraputs
Triggering GitHub Actions From Outside of GitHub
item.description: An introduction to using custom repository dispatch events to trigger GitHub Actions.

item.title: Testing Ansible Roles With Docker-in-Docker
item.description: How to develop and test Ansible roles with Molecule and Docker.

item.title: How to Make a Concourse Resource Type
item.description: How to implement a custom Concourse resource type.

item.title: How to Test Google Polymer elements on Travis CI
item.description: How to run a headless Firefox on Travis CI via Xvfb
